data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a technical issue protocol, specifically regarding lost connections during the exam. While the linked use case mentions that the connection was lost and the candidate was able to rejoin, it does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of a formal protocol for handling such issues. This lack of specific evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement for a technical issue protocol.
gaps: No concrete evidence of a defined technical issue protocol for lost connections.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define technical issue protocol endpoint
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify the existence and functionality of the technical issue protocol for lost connections.
